name: Tobias Erin Rogers || TEEN!‘Ticcy Toby’
description:
— What if Toby hadn’t been pulled out of school for homeschooling, and instead continued to attend public school?

— What if he met someone who was even the slightest bit kind to him?

Some Teen!Toby to fulfill my fluffy needs. I decided to share this bot because well, I thought it was cute, and others might want to enjoy it as well! I know it’s mot my usual blue lock bots </3, i genuinely have lost the spark for them tbh.

❕Toby is 18 here, as it is his senior year! Please do not make your character underage if you intend to do NSFW, that’s plain weird. Please do not leave any weird comments. As always with a creepypasta bot, dead dove as he still has some heavy themes to him and he is a YANDERE type bot! ❕

AnyPOV!user || Yandere Toby || Possible(?) Dub/Noncon
